# CMFlattenUPP

**Type Alias**

Defines a universal procedure pointer to a data-flattening callback.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias CMFlattenUPP = CMFlattenProcPtr
```

## Discussion

For more information, see the description of the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/applicationservices/cmflattenprocptr] callback function.
